Part.Source:
&CteArqXml = '' if &CaminhoArquivoXml.IsEmpty() &CteArqXml = &ManXmlNfe Else &xmlCTe.Open(&CaminhoArquivoXml) Do While not &xmlCTe.EOF &CteArqXml += &xmlCTe.ReadRawXML() &xmlCTe.Read() Enddo &xmlCTe.Close() Endif
LeituraXmlDacte.Call(&CteArqXml, &SdtXmlCte)
PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('L', '#PADRAOOPERACAOFRETE#', 1, &EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') &CteLctCod = val(&PadObs)
PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('L', '#PADRAOCSTFRETE#', 1, &EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') &CteImpCst.FromString(&PadObs)
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod
retornaSoNumeros.Call(FilCpj, &FilCpj)
Do CAse Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CNPJ = &FilCpj or &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ = &FilCpj &CteEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &FilCod = FilCod Exit Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CNPJ = &FilCpj or &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ = &FilCpj &CteEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada &FilCod = FilCod exit EndCAse EndFor
&CteModCod = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.mod &CteSer = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.serie)// serie &CteNum = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.nCT) //numero If &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.tpAmb = '1' //ambiente produção 1 &FilAmbEms = TAmb.Producao EndIf &CteChv = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.chCTe //chave cte
For each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CteNum, CteChv, CteModCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteNum = &CteNum Where CteChv = &CteChv Where CteModCod = &CteModCod &CteCod = CteCod
&dhEmi = substr(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.dhEmi,9,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.dhEmi,6,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.dhEmi,1,4) CteDtaEms = CtoD(&dhEmi)
CteHorEms = substr(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.dhEmi,12,8) // If &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.Tpimp = '1' // CteProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA // Else CteProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS //SEMPRE TERCEIROS // EndIf
CteNum = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.nCT) CteLctCod = &CteLctCod
CteNatOpe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.natOp CteSer = &CteSer Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '0' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.Normal
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '1' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.Subcontratacao
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '2' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.Redespacho
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '3' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.Redespachointermediario
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '4' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.Multimodal
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '6' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.TransportePessoas
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '7' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.TransporteValores
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '8' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.ExcessoBagagem EndCase
Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.modal = '01' CteMod = ModalCte.Rodoviario Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.modal = '06' CteMod = ModalCte.Multimodal EndCase
CteCfopFor = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.CFOP RetornaCfopEntrada.Call(&EmpCod, &CteLctCod, CteCfopFor, &CfoEmpAprvCredIcmsPer, &CteCfop) CteCfop = &CteCfop
If &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.indGlobalizado = '1' CteindGlo = true Else CteindGlo = False EndIf
Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpCTe = '0' CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Normal Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpCTe = '1' CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Complemento Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpCTe = '2' CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Anulacao Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpCTe = '3' CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Substituicao EndCase
CteChv = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.chCTe CteModCod = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.mod CteIniCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.cMunIni) CteIniCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.xmunIni CteIniUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.UFIni CteTerCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.cMunFim) CteTerCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.xMunFim CteTerUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.UFFim If &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.retira = '1' CteIndRec = IndicaRecebedor.Sim Else CteIndRec = IndicaRecebedor.Nao EndIf
CteIndRecDes = ''
Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.indIEToma = '1' CtePapTom = PaPelTomador.ContribuinteICMS
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.indIEToma = '2' CtePapTom = PaPelTomador.ContribuinteIsento
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.indIEToma = '9' CtePapTom = PaPelTomador.NaoContribuinte EndCase
CteEntSai = &CteEntSai
//TOMADOR VAI SER O TRANSPORTADOR, EMITENTE DO CTE &PesCnpj = '' If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.CNPJ.IsEmpty() CteTomCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.CNPJ &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.CNPJ Else CteTomCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.CPF &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.CPF EndIf Do 'GetPessoa' CteTomCod = &PEsCod
CteTomInsEst = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.IE CteTomRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.xNome CteTomFan = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.xFant //CteTomFon = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.fone CteTomLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.xLgr CteTomNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.nro CteTomCpl= &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.xCpl CteTomBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.xBairro CteTomCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.cMun) CteTomCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.xMun CteTomCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.CEP CteTomUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.UF CteTomPaiCod = 1058 CteTomPaiNom = 'BRASIL' //CteTomEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.e //TOMADOR VAI SER O TRANSPORTADOR, EMITENTE DO CTE
// FILIAL É A ORIGEM, CLIENTE É O DESTINO if &CteEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CNPJ.IsEmpty() &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CNPJ Else &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CPF EndIf Do 'GetPessoa' CteDesCod = &PEsCod CteDesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CNPJ CteDesCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CPF CteDesIns = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.iE CteDesRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.xNome CteDesLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xLgr CteDesNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.nro CteDesCpl = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xcpl CteDesBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xBairro CteDesCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.cMun) CteDesCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xMun CteDesCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.CEP CteDesUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.UF CteDesPaiCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.cpais) CteDesPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xpais CteDesEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.Email Else // CLIENTE É A ORIGEM, FILIAL É O DESTINO If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.CNPJ.IsEmpty() &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.CNPJ Else &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.CPF EndIf Do 'GetPessoa' CteDesCod = &PEsCod CteDesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.CNPJ CteDesCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.CPF CteDesIns = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.iE CteDesRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.xNome CteDesLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.xLgr CteDesNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.nro CteDesCpl = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.xcpl CteDesBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.xBairro CteDesCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.cMun) CteDesCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.xMun CteDesCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.CEP CteDesUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.UF CteDesPaiCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.cpais) CteDesPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.xpais CteDesEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.Email Endif
//CteTomModDoc //CteTomSerDoc //CteTomSubSerDoc //CteTomNroDoc //CteTomVlrDoc //CteTomDtaEmsDoc //CteTomChvEmt //CteTomChvAna //CteTomChvCpl //CteTomChvAnaOri //CteTomDtaEmsDec
CteDadAdiTra = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.compl.xCaracAd CteDadAdiSer = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.compl.xCaracSer //CteObsGer CteObsAut = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.compl.xObs
If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ.IsEmpty() or not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CPF.IsEmpty() If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ.IsEmpty() &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ Else &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CPF EndIf
Do 'GetPessoa'
CteExpCod = &PesCod CteExpCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ CteExpCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CPF CteExpIns = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.IE CteExpRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.xNome CteExpLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xLgr CteExpNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.nro CteExpCpl = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xCpl CteExpBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xBairro CteExpCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.cMun) CteExpCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xMun CteExpUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.UF CteExpCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.CEP CteExpPaiCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.cPais) CteExpPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xPais CteExpEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.Email EndIf
If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ.IsEmpty() or not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CPF.IsEmpty() If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ.IsEmpty() &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ Else &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CPF EndIf
Do 'GetPessoa' CteRecCod = &PesCod CteRecCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ CteRecCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CPF CteRecIns = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.iE CteRecRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.xNome CteRecFon =&SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.Fone CteRecLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xLgr CteRecNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.nro CteRecCpl =&SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xCpl CteRecBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xBairro CteRecCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.cMun) CteRecCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xMun CteRecCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.cEP CteRecUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.UF CteRecPaiCod = Val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.cPais) CteRecPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xPais CteRecEml= &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.email EndIf
CteVlrTotPreSer = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.vPrest.vTPrest) CteVlrRecSer = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.vPrest.vRec)
Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS00.CST = '00' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Normal &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS00.vBC CteImpVbc = val(&Varchar) &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS00.pICMS CteImpAli = val(&Varchar) &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS00.vICMS CteImpVlr = val(&Varchar)
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS45.CST = '40' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Isento
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS60.CST = '60' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Substituicao
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS20.CST = '20' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Reduzida &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS20.vBC CteImpVbc = val(&Varchar) &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS20.pICMS CteImpAli = val(&Varchar) &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS20.vICMS CteImpVlr = val(&Varchar)
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS45.CST = '41' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.naoTributada Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS45.CST = '51' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.deferido
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS90.CST = '90' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Outros &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS90.vBC CteImpVbc = val(&Varchar) &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS90.pICMS CteImpAli = val(&Varchar) &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS90.vICMS CteImpVlr = val(&Varchar)
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMSSN.indSN = '1' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Simples EndCase
if &CteImpCst.IsEmpty() CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Outros Else CteImpCst = &CteImpCst Endif
Exit When None
// if &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CNPJ = &FilCpj or &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ = &FilCpj // &CteEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida // Else // &CteEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada // Endif
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod &CteCod = UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Udp(domParCod.CTE, &EmpCod, &FilCod)
CteCod = &CteCod &dhEmi = substr(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.dhEmi,9,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.dhEmi,6,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.dhEmi,1,4) CteDtaEms = CtoD(&dhEmi)
CteHorEms = substr(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.dhEmi,12,8) // If &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.Tpimp = '1' // CteProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA // Else CteProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS //SEMPRE TERCEIROS // EndIf
CteNum = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.nCT) CteLctCod = &CteLctCod
CteNatOpe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.natOp CteSer = &CteSer Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '0' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.Normal
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '1' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.Subcontratacao
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '2' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.Redespacho
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '3' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.Redespachointermediario
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '4' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.Multimodal
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '6' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.TransportePessoas
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '7' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.TransporteValores
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpServ = '8' CteTipSer = TipoSErvicoCte.ExcessoBagagem EndCase
Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.modal = '01' CteMod = ModalCte.Rodoviario Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.modal = '06' CteMod = ModalCte.Multimodal EndCase
CteCfopFor = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.CFOP RetornaCfopEntrada.Call(&EmpCod, &CteLctCod, CteCfopFor, &CfoEmpAprvCredIcmsPer, &CteCfop) CteCfop = &CteCfop
If &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.indGlobalizado = '1' CteindGlo = true Else CteindGlo = False EndIf
Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpCTe = '0' CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Normal Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpCTe = '1' CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Complemento Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpCTe = '2' CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Anulacao Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.TpCTe = '3' CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Substituicao EndCase
CteChv = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.chCTe CteModCod = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.mod CteIniCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.cMunIni) CteIniCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.xmunIni CteIniUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.UFIni CteTerCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.cMunFim) CteTerCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.xMunFim CteTerUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.UFFim If &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.retira = '1' CteIndRec = IndicaRecebedor.Sim Else CteIndRec = IndicaRecebedor.Nao EndIf
CteIndRecDes = ''
Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.indIEToma = '1' CtePapTom = PaPelTomador.ContribuinteICMS
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.indIEToma = '2' CtePapTom = PaPelTomador.ContribuinteIsento
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.ide.indIEToma = '9' CtePapTom = PaPelTomador.NaoContribuinte EndCase
CteEntSai = &CteEntSai
//TOMADOR VAI SER O TRANSPORTADOR, EMITENTE DO CTE &PesCnpj = '' If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.CNPJ.IsEmpty() CteTomCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.CNPJ &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.CNPJ Else CteTomCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.CPF &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.CPF EndIf Do 'GetPessoa' CteTomCod = &PEsCod
CteTomInsEst = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.IE CteTomRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.xNome CteTomFan = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.xFant //CteTomFon = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.fone CteTomLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.xLgr CteTomNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.nro CteTomCpl= &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.xCpl CteTomBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.xBairro CteTomCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.cMun) CteTomCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.xMun CteTomCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.CEP CteTomUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderemit.UF CteTomPaiCod = 1058 CteTomPaiNom = 'BRASIL' //CteTomEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.e //TOMADOR VAI SER O TRANSPORTADOR, EMITENTE DO CTE
// FILIAL É A ORIGEM, CLIENTE É O DESTINO if &CteEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CNPJ.IsEmpty() &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CNPJ Else &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CPF EndIf Do 'GetPessoa' CteDesCod = &PEsCod CteDesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CNPJ CteDesCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CPF CteDesIns = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.iE CteDesRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.xNome CteDesLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xLgr CteDesNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.nro CteDesCpl = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xcpl CteDesBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xBairro CteDesCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.cMun) CteDesCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xMun CteDesCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.CEP CteDesUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.UF CteDesPaiCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.cpais) CteDesPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xpais CteDesEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.Email Else // CLIENTE É A ORIGEM, FILIAL É O DESTINO If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.CNPJ.IsEmpty() &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.CNPJ Else &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.CPF EndIf Do 'GetPessoa' CteDesCod = &PEsCod CteDesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.CNPJ CteDesCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.CPF CteDesIns = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.iE CteDesRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.xNome CteDesLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.xLgr CteDesNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.nro CteDesCpl = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.xcpl CteDesBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.xBairro CteDesCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.cMun) CteDesCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.xMun CteDesCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.CEP CteDesUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.UF CteDesPaiCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.cpais) CteDesPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.enderReme.xpais CteDesEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Rem.Email Endif
//CteTomModDoc //CteTomSerDoc //CteTomSubSerDoc //CteTomNroDoc //CteTomVlrDoc //CteTomDtaEmsDoc //CteTomChvEmt //CteTomChvAna //CteTomChvCpl //CteTomChvAnaOri //CteTomDtaEmsDec
CteDadAdiTra = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.compl.xCaracAd CteDadAdiSer = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.compl.xCaracSer //CteObsGer CteObsAut = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.compl.xObs
If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ.IsEmpty() or not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CPF.IsEmpty() If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ.IsEmpty() &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ Else &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CPF EndIf
Do 'GetPessoa'
CteExpCod = &PesCod CteExpCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ CteExpCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CPF CteExpIns = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.IE CteExpRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.xNome CteExpLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xLgr CteExpNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.nro CteExpCpl = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xCpl CteExpBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xBairro CteExpCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.cMun) CteExpCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xMun CteExpUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.UF CteExpCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.CEP CteExpPaiCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.cPais) CteExpPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xPais CteExpEml = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.Email EndIf
If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ.IsEmpty() or not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CPF.IsEmpty() If not &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ.IsEmpty() &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ Else &PesCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CPF EndIf
Do 'GetPessoa' CteRecCod = &PesCod CteRecCnpj = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ CteRecCpf = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CPF CteRecIns = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.iE CteRecRaz = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.xNome CteRecFon =&SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.Fone CteRecLog = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xLgr CteRecNro = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.nro CteRecCpl =&SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xCpl CteRecBai = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xBairro CteRecCidCod = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.cMun) CteRecCidNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xMun CteRecCep = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.cEP CteRecUfe = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.UF CteRecPaiCod = Val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.cPais) CteRecPaiNom = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xPais CteRecEml= &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.email EndIf
CteVlrTotPreSer = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.vPrest.vTPrest) CteVlrRecSer = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.vPrest.vRec)
Do Case Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS00.CST = '00' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Normal &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS00.vBC CteImpVbc = val(&Varchar) &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS00.pICMS CteImpAli = val(&Varchar) &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS00.vICMS CteImpVlr = val(&Varchar)
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS45.CST = '40' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Isento
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS60.CST = '60' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Substituicao
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS20.CST = '20' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Reduzida &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS20.vBC CteImpVbc = val(&Varchar) &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS20.pICMS CteImpAli = val(&Varchar) &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS20.vICMS CteImpVlr = val(&Varchar)
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS45.CST = '41' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.naoTributada Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS45.CST = '51' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.deferido
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS90.CST = '90' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Outros &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS90.vBC CteImpVbc = val(&Varchar) &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS90.pICMS CteImpAli = val(&Varchar) &Varchar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMS90.vICMS CteImpVlr = val(&Varchar)
Case &SdtXmlCte.infCte.imp.ICMS.ICMSSN.indSN = '1' CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Simples EndCase
if &CteImpCst.IsEmpty() CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Outros Else CteImpCst = &CteImpCst Endif
//////// CteImpPerRed //////// CteImpVbcRet //////// CteImpVstRet //////// CteImpAliRet //////// CteImpVlrCre //////// CteImpVlrIcmUfe //////// CteConSplNac //////// CteImpAliTotTri //////// CteImpVlrTotTri //////// CteImpObsFis
//CteImpOrdVlrPis //CteImpOrdVlrCof //CteImpOrdVlrIpr //CteImpOrdVlrInss //CteImpOrdVlrCsll //CteSerDes //CteCarVlrTotAvb
CteCarVlrTot = val(&SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infCarga.vCarga) CteCarProPre = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infCarga.proPred CteCarOtrCar = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infCarga.xOutCat //CteFatNro //CteFatVlr //CteFatVlrDes //CteFatVlrLiq //CteChvSub //CteChvTom
CteModRodRNTRC = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo.RNTRC
//CteModRodLot = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo.lota //CteModRodCol = &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo. //CteModRodTaf //CteModRodNroRegEst //////// CtePosPre
CteAutNumPro = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.nProt CteArqXml= &CteArqXml CteAutSts = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.cStat CteAutDigVal = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.digVal CteAutDatHorRec = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.dhRecbto
//############################################ CteSts = Status_NFe.Importada CteStsFin = Status_Financeiro.Aberto CteAutMsg = &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.cStat // grava o status aqui para poder importar depois na proxima tela //##############################################
CteEnvEml = NfeEnvEml.Enviado CteStsImp = 'S'
//////// CtePosDup //////// CtePosVei //////// CtePosDocAnt EndNew
&CteCarCod = 0 For &SdtXmlCteInfQi In &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infCarga.infQI &CteCarCod +=1 New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CteCarCod = &CteCarCod Do Case Case &SdtXmlCteInfQi.cUnid = '00' CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.m3 Case &SdtXmlCteInfQi.cUnid = '01' CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.KG Case &SdtXmlCteInfQi.cUnid = '02' CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.TON Case &SdtXmlCteInfQi.cUnid = '03' CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.UNIDADE Case &SdtXmlCteInfQi.cUnid = '04' CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.LITROS Case &SdtXmlCteInfQi.cUnid = '05' CteCarUnd = UnidadeMedidaCte.MMBTU EndCase
CteCarQtd = val(&SdtXmlCteInfQi.qCarga) CteCarTip = &SdtXmlCteInfQi.tpMed CtecarIns = 'A' EndNew EndFor
&CteDocCod = 0 For &SdtXmlCteinfDoc In &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infDoc.infNFee &CteDocCod +=1 New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.Nfe CteDocCod = &CteDocCod CteDocChvNfe = &SdtXmlCteinfDoc.chave EndNew EndFor
For &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff In &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infDoc.infNFF &CteDocCod +=1 New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CteDocCod = &CteDocCod CteDocNroRom = &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.nRoma CteDocNroPed = &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.nPed CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.NF &dhEmi = substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.dEmi,9,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.dEmi,6,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.dEmi,1,4) CteDocDta = CtoD(&dhEmi) DO Case Case &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.mod = '04' CteDocMod = ModeloNotaCte.Produtor Case &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.mod = '01' CteDocMod = ModeloNotaCte.AVULSA1A EndCase
CteDocSer = &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.serie CteDocNro = &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.nDoc CteDocCfoPre = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.nCFOP) CteDocVlrTotPro = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.vProd) CteDocVlrTotNtf = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.vNF) CteDocVbc = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.vBC) CteDocVlrIcm = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.vICMS) CteDocVstIcm = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.vBCST) CteDocVst = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.vST) CteDocPes = val(&SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.nPeso) EndNew EndFor
For &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross In &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infDoc.infOutross &CteDocCod +=1 New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod CteCod = &CteCod CteDocCod = &CteDocCod Do Case Case &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.tpDoc = '99' CteDocTipOri = DocumentoOriginario.Outros Case &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.tpDoc = '00' CteDocTipOri = DocumentoOriginario.DEclaracao Case &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.tpDoc = '10' CteDocTipOri = DocumentoOriginario.DUtoviario Case &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.tpDoc = '59' CteDocTipOri = DocumentoOriginario.CFeSAT Case &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.tpDoc = '65' CteDocTipOri = DocumentoOriginario.NFCe EndCASE
CteDocDes = &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.descOutros If not &SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.dPrev.IsEmpty() &dhEmi = substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.dPrev,9,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.dPrev,6,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.dPrev,1,4) CteDocDtaPre = CtoD(&dhEmi) EndIf CteDocTip = TipoDocumentoCte.Otros
&dhEmi = substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.dEmi,9,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.dEmi,6,2) +'/'+ substr(&SdtXmlCteinfDocinfOutross.dEmi,1,4) CteDocDta = CtoD(&dhEmi) CteDocNro = &SdtXmlCteinfDocInfNff.nDoc EndNew EndFor EndFor
commit
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WizardData.Envolvidos.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Envolvidos.FilCod = &FiLCod &WizardData.Envolvidos.CteCod = &CteCod &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
Sub 'GetPessoa' &PesCod= 0 If &PesCnpj.Length() >= 14 &PesCnpj = RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(&PesCnpj) EndIf &PesCnpjFormatado = &PesCnpj ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&PesCnpjFormatado, &cnpjerro, 'S') For each order EmpCod,PesCnpj Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ((PesCnpj = &PesCnpj or PesCnpj = &PesCnpjFormatado) and PesTip = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA) or ((PesCpf = &PesCnpj or PesCpf = &PesCnpjFormatado) and PesTip = TipoPessoa.FISICA) when not &PesCnpj.IsEmpty() &PesCod = PesCod Exit EndFor EndSub
